title: Roasted Radish Delight
description: A simple and flavorful side dish that brings out the natural sweetness of radishes. Perfect for a quick and easy addition to any meal.
instructions: Toss the radish cubes with olive oil, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder in a bowl until they are evenly coated.
Spread the radish mixture on a baking sheet in a single layer.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the radishes are tender and caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
